name: jang
summary: JANG — Adaptive Mixed-Precision Quantization for Apple Silicon. v2.5.18: DSV4 sampling defaults bumped to thinking-rep_penalty=1.15 / chat-rep_penalty=1.05 / max_new_tokens=4096 (audit-validated; prevents OOD-prompt repetition collapse in thinking mode). v2.5.17: force lazy parameter materialization at end of _hydrate_jangtq_model. v2.5.16: DSV4 eos list survives PreTrainedTokenizerFast fallback.
